name: Mocha Mint Crisps
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, prepare Mocha Mint Sugar by stirring together powdered sugar, crushed peppermint candies (about 6), and powdered instant coffee.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter and granulated sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add egg, corn syrup, and peppermint extract; mix thoroughly.
5. Dissolve 1 teaspoon of powdered instant coffee in hot water and stir into the butter mixture.
6. Gradually stir together flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt into the butter mixture, blending well.
7. Shape dough into 1-inch balls. (Dough may be refrigerated for a short time to make handling easier.)
8. Place dough balls about 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
9. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until no imprint remains when touched lightly.
10. Cool slightly on the cookie sheet, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes about 4 dozen cookies.
